title: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report April 8 2026
section_path: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report April 8 2026
section_path_text: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report April 8 2026
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 08/04/2026
Today, DCE iron ore futures trended weaker overall. The most-traded contract I2609 ultimately closed at 766.5 yuan/mt,down 1.35% from the previous trading session. Spot prices fell 5-8 yuan/mt from the previous trading day.
